channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nussmeier throws late TD passes, No. 13 LSU rallies to beat No. 9 Ole Miss 29-26 in overtime
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Garrett Nussmeier threw a tying touchdown pass in the final seconds of regulation and hit Kyren Lacy for a 25-yard scoring strike on No. 13 LSU's first play of overtime, completing a stunning 29-26 comeback victory over No. 9 Mississippi on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dylan Sampson has 1-yard TD run in OT to lift No. 8 Tennessee past Florida, 23-17
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Dylan Sampson scored his third touchdown of the game on a 1-yard run in overtime to give No. 8 Tennessee a 23-17 victory over Florida on Saturday night. The Volunteers (5-1, 2-1 Southeastern Conference) went to overtime for only the second time.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter leaves game against Kansas State with apparent shoulder injury
item.description: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter left the Buffaloes’ game against Kansas State late in the second quarter Saturday night after an apparent shoulder injury on a 14-yard reception.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ejection of Oregon's Traeshon Holden is third this season in FBS for a player spitting on opponent
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — Oregon receiver Traeshon Holden was ejected from Saturday night's game against Ohio State for unsportsmanlike conduct after he spit on a Buckeyes player, the second spitting incident of the day in college football and third of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Beck passes for 459 yards and 3 TDs as No. 5 Georgia holds off Van Buren, Mississippi State 41-31
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Carson Beck didn't panic when No. 5 Georgia found second-half resistance from heavy underdog Mississippi State. Beck passed for a career-high 459 yards and three touchdowns and Georgia withstood Mississippi State's second-half comeback bid for a 41-31 win Saturday.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NBA player Steve Francis slams Lakers over decision to hire JJ Redick as coach
item.description: In June, the Los Angeles Lakers and former NBA player JJ Redick reached an agreement on a coaching contract weeks after UConn coach Dan Hurley turned down an offer from the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Santa Clara women’s basketball coach Bill Carr resigns after eight seasons
item.description: The eight-year Santa Clara coach's surprising resignation comes a little more than two weeks before the new season begins.
item.dc:creator: Jon Becker, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tim Walz appearance prompts protests and silent treatment at high school football game: 'getting desperate'
item.description: Tim Walz appeared at Mankato West High School on Friday for a football game and was met with protests and a lukewarm reception from the crowd.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oklahoma and Texas, one of college football's most storied rivalries, open a new chapter in the SEC
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Perhaps the only way the Oklahoma-Texas rivalry could have become even more intense happened when both joined the powerful Southeastern Conference in July. The series that began in 1900 immediately will rank with the best of the SEC’s older ones — Alabama vs.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies comeback falls short against UNLV, 50-34
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State fell into too big of a hole against UNLV on Friday night, and despite a valiant second half comeback, the Aggies lost their fifth straight game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers vs. Padres: Who is favored to win tonight's NLDS Game 5?
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Friday night’s winner-take-all NL Division Series Game 5 between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers promises to be a thrilling finale to a contentious series between the division rivals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers pitcher reportedly robbed of luxury watch at Southern California racetrack
item.description: Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler was reportedly robbed of a luxury watch at a horse racing track in what appeared to be a grand theft spree perpetrated by multiple organized groups.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 on Sunday night to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stenhouse snaps 65-race losing streak after late crash at Talladega scrambles playoff picture
item.description: Ricky Stenhouse Jr. snapped a 65-race losing streak by winning in overtime at Talladega on Sunday after a late crash collected more than half the field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lightning preseason game against Nashville canceled
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning preseason game scheduled for Monday against the Nashville Predators has been canceled due to Hurricane Milton, the team announced Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Baseball fans discuss Dodgers’ chances in NLDS Game 2 over donuts
item.description: After a rollercoaster of emotions in Game 1 of the National League Divisional Series, baseball lovers were up early getting donuts in Inglewood and eager to share their thoughts with the news on Sunday's matchup between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
